notes: Total rest. The adaptations from the whole summer land THIS week — protect it.
Movement, not training. Stop while it still feels pointless.
Coffee-pace. Legs only.
Sleep is the session.
No watch-staring. Niggles get noticed and noted this week.
A fell WALK is perfect — keep the love, skip the load.
End of week 1: you should feel restless. That's the sign it worked.
Run by feel — no targets all week. Strength returns light (60-70%).
Conversational throughout.
Strides = smooth 20s, full recovery. Waking the legs, not training them.
First 'long' run back — friendly, flat-ish, fun.
Two-week reset complete. The build starts Monday.
